steps.title: Find the remaining length
steps.content:
The line segment is 113 cm total. One part is 47 cm long. Subtract to find the combined length of the other two parts:
$$113 - 47 = 66 \text{ cm}$$

steps.title: Divide equally between the two parts
steps.content:
The other two parts have equal length. Divide the remaining 66 cm by 2:
$$\frac{66}{2} = 33 \text{ cm}$$
Each of the two equal parts is 33 cm long.
